mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.manufacturer_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code
SELECT p.*, m.manufacturer_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_id, category_code, manufacturer_code, description, unit_price, stock_quantity) VALUES (#{productId}, #{categoryCode}, #{manufacturerCode}, #{description}, #{unitPrice}, #{stockQuantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - #{quantity} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock_quantity >= #{quantity}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.manufacturer_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE p.stock_quantity < #{threshold} ORDER BY p.stock_quantity ASC
SELECT p.*, m.manufacturer_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON p.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE p.category_code = #{categoryCode}
SELECT DISTINCT category_code FROM product ORDER BY category_code
